title: TNT crystal
description: A cosmetic resource pack that replaces the End Crystal model with a TNT-style design for a fresh Crystal PvP visual experience.
body:
TNT Crystal is a cosmetic Minecraft resource pack that visually replaces the End Crystal model with a TNT-style design.

The pack is purely visual and does not change gameplay mechanics, FPS, ping, or performance in any way. It is designed for players who want a different and clean look during Crystal PvP while keeping the vanilla behavior of End Crystals fully intact.

This resource pack is lightweight, easy to use, and compatible with standard Minecraft versions that support resource packs. Simply enable it and enjoy a fresh visual style without affecting your gameplay.
